title: senecio eruciformis var. brachycephalus
intro: Senecio eruciformis var. brachycephalus is a variety of the plant Senecio eruciformis, commonly known as the upright groundsel, a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a stimulant and diuretic, and to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Senecio eruciformis var. brachycephalus include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
